categories.name: Signature Facials
categories.sub: Relaxing, results-driven facials personalized to your skin.

categories.name: Advanced Treatments
categories.sub: Higher-intensity treatments that rebuild and renew — not break the skin down.

categories.name: Microchanneling
categories.sub: Collagen-rebuilding microchanneling with growth factors — our corrective specialty.

categories.name: Peels & Resurfacing
categories.sub: Resurfacing treatments that brighten and renew with little to no downtime.

services.name: New Client Consultation & Facial
services.blurb: Your first visit: a full skin consultation plus a customized facial to map out your plan.
services.desc: Your first visit — a full skin consultation paired with a customized facial so we can find the right treatment plan for you.

services.name: Polished Skin Signature Facial
services.blurb: A personalized cleanse, exfoliation, and mask to refresh and balance your skin.
services.desc: A personalized cleanse, exfoliation, and nourishing mask to refresh and balance your skin.

services.name: Deluxe Renewal Facial
services.blurb: An elevated facial with added treatment steps for a deeper renewal.
services.desc: An elevated facial with added treatment steps for a deeper, more restorative renewal.

services.name: Glowing Renewal Facial
services.blurb: A brightening, hydrating facial that restores radiance and even tone.
services.desc: A brightening, hydrating facial designed to restore radiance and even out tone for a lit-from-within glow.

services.name: Dermaplane Glow Facial
services.blurb: Gentle dermaplaning removes dead skin and fine hair for baby-soft, glowing skin.
services.desc: Gentle dermaplaning removes dead skin and fine vellus hair, leaving skin baby-soft and makeup-flawless.

services.name: Gentleman's Facial
services.blurb: A tailored facial for men's skin — deep cleanse, exfoliate, and soothe.
services.desc: A facial tailored to men's skin: deep cleanse, exfoliation, and soothing care for a healthy, comfortable complexion.

services.name: Nano Infusion Facial
services.blurb: Nano-infusion drives targeted serums deep into the skin — visible results, no needles.
services.desc: Nano-infusion technology drives targeted serums deep into the skin for visible results, with no needles and no downtime.

services.name: Polished Skin Glo2Facial
services.blurb: Our signature oxygenating facial combines gentle exfoliation, deep hydration, lymphatic stimulation, and customized ingredient infusion to leave skin brighter, smoother, healthier, and visibly refreshed. Perfect for dullness, dehydration, sensitivity, rosacea-prone skin, and healthy aging.
services.desc: Our most-loved treatment — a 3-in-1 oxygenating facial that exfoliates, triggers your skin's own oxygen surge, and infuses nourishing serums.

services.name: Polished Skin Deluxe Glo2Facial
services.blurb: The Glo2Facial with added advanced steps for an even deeper treatment.
services.desc: The signature Glo2Facial enhanced with added advanced steps for an even deeper, more transformative result.

services.name: Jet Plasma®
services.blurb: This non-invasive treatment uses plasma energy to support collagen production, improve skin firmness, reduce inflammation, and enhance overall skin health. Ideal for clients seeking age-management benefits with no downtime.
services.desc: A non-invasive treatment that supports collagen production, improves skin firmness, reduces inflammation, and enhances overall skin health — with no downtime.

services.name: Regenerative Treatment
services.blurb: A comprehensive session combining advanced modalities to rebuild the skin.
services.desc: A comprehensive, full-length session combining advanced modalities to deeply rebuild and regenerate the skin.

services.name: ProCell Microchanneling
services.blurb: Advanced microchanneling creates controlled micro-channels that stimulate collagen and elastin production while enhancing the delivery of growth factors and peptides. Helps improve fine lines, acne scarring, enlarged pores, skin texture, and overall skin rejuvenation.
services.desc: Microchanneling paired with bioengineered stem-cell growth-factor serums to rebuild collagen and renew skin from within.
services.tagline: Stimulate Collagen • Improve Texture • Renew Skin

services.name: Microchanneling & NexGen+ PDRN
services.blurb: Microchanneling enhanced with NexGen+ PDRN to accelerate repair and renewal.
services.desc: Microchanneling enhanced with NexGen+ PDRN salmon-derived regenerative serum to accelerate healing, hydration, and renewal.

services.name: Advanced Microchanneling & PDRN
services.blurb: Our most advanced microchanneling protocol with PDRN for maximum regeneration.
services.desc: Our most advanced microchanneling protocol, combining deeper treatment with PDRN for maximum regeneration and results.

services.name: BioRePeel
services.blurb: This innovative Italian peel stimulates cellular renewal while improving pigmentation, acne, texture, fine lines, and dullness. Unlike traditional peels, BioRePeel delivers corrective results with minimal downtime and maximum glow.
services.desc: A two-phase Italian TCA peel that exfoliates while it bio-stimulates collagen — brighter, smoother, more even skin with little to no downtime.

services.name: BioRePeel Deluxe
services.blurb: The BioRePeel with added treatment steps for an enhanced result.
services.desc: The BioRePeel enhanced with added treatment steps for a deeper resurfacing and an even brighter finish.

services.name: Oxygen Peel
services.blurb: A gentle oxygenating peel that decongests and refreshes — no downtime.
services.desc: A gentle oxygenating peel that decongests, brightens, and refreshes the skin with zero downtime.

services.name: Brighten & Balance Peel
services.blurb: A customized peel to brighten tone and balance texture.
services.desc: A customized peel that brightens tone, smooths texture, and balances the skin for a clear, even complexion.
